focus: eye on dorsal crown + hunter tentacles longer than arms + ever-taller W shoulders

A.hypothesis: CROWN-EYE — rise very high, tilt up more so eye sits on dorsal ridge

B.hypothesis: LONG HUNTERS — tentacles more extended, much longer than arms; tighter arm crown

C.hypothesis: EARLY STATION — eye station very close to the forehead so the W tilts skyward

D.hypothesis: COMBINE — crown eye + long hunters + big W
